mapper.select: SELECT E.EMP_ID, E.DEPT_ID, D.DEPT_CODE, E.LOGIN_ID, E.PASSWORD, E.EMP_NAME, E.ROLE_CODE, E.STATUS FROM EMPLOYEE E LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON E.DEPT_ID = D.DEPT_ID WHERE E.LOGIN_ID = #{loginId}

SELECT E.EMP_ID, E.DEPT_ID, D.DEPT_CODE, E.LOGIN_ID, E.PASSWORD, E.EMP_NAME, E.ROLE_CODE, E.STATUS FROM EMPLOYEE E LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON E.DEPT_ID = D.DEPT_ID WHERE E.EMP_ID = #{empId} AND E.STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EMPLOYEE (EMP_ID, LOGIN_ID, PASSWORD, EMP_NAME, DEPT_ID, PHONE, EMAIL, ROLE_CODE , STATUS) VALUES (SEQ_EMPLOYEE.nextval, #{dto.loginId}, #{encodedPassword}, #{dto.empName}, #{dto.deptId}, #{dto.phone}, #{dto.email}, 'STAFF', 'PENDING')
mapper.update: UPDATE EMPLOYEE SET PASSWORD = #{encodedPassword}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId}
